name: Parse pairsam and extra columns
summary: Pairsam SAM columns, supported add-columns, and parse stats.
goal: Match pairtools for scoped pairsam output, supported add-columns, and parse stats.
explicit_non_goals: Do not implement full walks/chimeric parse behavior.
Do not implement sort or downstream commands.
oracle_commands: pixi run pairtools parse -c tests/fixtures/M040_pairsam.chrom.sizes --add-columns mapq,pos5,pos3,cigar,read_len tests/fixtures/M040_pairsam.sam
candidate_commands: pixi run cargo run -- parse -c tests/fixtures/M040_pairsam.chrom.sizes --add-columns mapq,pos5,pos3,cigar,read_len tests/fixtures/M040_pairsam.sam
acceptance_criteria: Pairsam rows and headers match scoped pairtools oracle fixtures.
known_risks: SAM serialization details may vary with htslib versions.
